title: Adding dropdown option to email column
excerpt: Is there a way we could add email addresses to a board? I’d like the option to choose from a list of email addresses that I regularly use. Sort of like adding a label instead of having to type the email address every tim…

posts.author: jarradwil (Jarrad Williamson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way we could add email addresses to a board? I’d like the option to choose from a list of email addresses that I regularly use. Sort of like adding a label instead of having to type the email address every time I want to send the email.

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be a nice feature too!
